Fair, Transparent & Secure

The first Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool (LBP) platform on Solana

How it works

Introducing Fairness to Solana
Solving the Liquidity Problem
Most tokens launching on Solana have poor liquidity and lack of fair early access for retail investors.
Transparent
LBPs are accessable to everyone, everything is happening transparently on-chain.
Secure
Employing a distinctive Post-LBP liquidity lock-up method to secure the interests of all participants.

Community first

At 1INTRO, community is the highest priority
We aim to give project teams the opportunity to raise enough funds to accomplish their goals and equal opporunitiy for retail investors to participate in the early stages of the project.

FAQs

We've got the answers
What is an LBP?
A Liquidity Bootstrapping Pool (LBP) is a mechanism designed for fair token distribution and price discovery, using the Balancer Curve as an example. It starts with an imbalance in token weightings, favoring the project's token, which encourages initial participation by offering a lower price. Over time, the pool's token weights adjust automatically, shifting towards equilibrium. This process allows for gradual price stabilization, leveraging Balancer Curve's customizable adjustments to manage price volatility and prevent front-running, offering a controlled environment for token launches.
As a new project on Solana, how can I create a new LBP?
Creating LBP on 1intro is permissionless, anyone can create a new LBP. For detailed user guide, please refer here.
As a community member, how can I participate in an LBP?
Participating in LBP is permissionless. For detailed user guide, please refer here.
What makes 1INTRO unique?
1INTRO is the 1st LBP platform on Solana, connecting innovators and investors in a fair, transparent and secure manner.
